message:
chore(release): bump workspace to 0.2.48

Highlights since 0.2.47:
- fix(pool): coalesce cache must store completion time, not entry time (#105)
- fix(pool): avoid u128->u64 as-cast on coalesced-reconstruct age_ms
- fix(tools/identity): tool-layer retry for update_agent_registration_token (#105)
- fix(db/pool): coalesce back-to-back archive-salvage reconstructs
- refactor(core): simplify Option chains in identity, setup, parse_token_line
- chore(lints): silence question_mark clippy + rustfmt identity helper

Pre-release polish:
- fix(cli): saturating_age_minutes_since clamps now-before-created to 0 (test was asserting clamp behavior)
- fix(cli): rewrite parse_mcp_config_status_url's else-if chain to satisfy clippy::question_mark

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
